strategy: Hit Myth, Life, or Death. He takes +30% from each and resists Balance 63%.
Avoid blading early. Every helpful charm gives him a +45% Balanceblade and a Tower Shield, so prefer traps and Feint for setup.
If you must blade, do it the same Round you hit so his shield never gets value, and pack a Shatter or piercing hit to punch through the Tower Shield.
He is stunable, so a stun buys a free setup or hit Round.
cheatNotes: Any helpful charm cast by you or a mob gives him a +45% Balanceblade and a Tower Shield. Blade only on the Round you hit, and bring a Shatter or piercing hit.
